0.response: {"Q0":"No real strategies, just trying to stay mindful and focus on each segment of the game and the instructions given. Except when it came to choosing the galaxies. I would quickly try to determine which was fuller than the other and I would say the number out loud and that helped me focus on choosing the right arrow and not look at the other number. Then quickly try to find my rhythm to keep up and stay within the allotted time. Then I was able to move faster. It also strengthened my focus and concentration"}

7.response: {"Q0":"Determining which was filled more than the other guided me in choosing the correct arrow that went with that galaxy."}

9.response: {"Q0":"No, everything was clearly explained in a concise manner, which made the instructions easy to remember and follow. Once I was able to get my eye and hand coordination together, I could focus on not choosing the wrong planets to dig."}

1.response: {"Q0":"No, I just went with the flow of the game and adapted for each segment."}

5.response: {"Q0":"No, I did not. I stopped immediately knowing he was gone."}

2.response: {"Q0":"I would guess more frequently since I only used the meteors only a few times in comparison to the rest. "}

6.response: {"Q0":"No, I did not. I was aware I would not be able to sell them, red gems and turned my focus on blue and green."}

8.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I was more focused on choosing the galaxies because the whole goal of the game was to find as many gems as I could to sell and increase my earnings."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes. The man on the red planet left and so it was easier to ignore red and yellow and only focus on blue and galaxy."}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, they were. I was well aware I couldn't sell the red gems anymore and did not dig at all on the red."}

10.response: {"Q0":"No, everything played out smoothly. The breaks in between segments, really helped take the nervousness out."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I absolutely loved this. Moreso, than just a game, this helped me quiet my mind and focus and concentrate. I suffer from anxiety and I get really nervous on timed tasks, but although, this was pretty fast. I was able to keep up and forget about thinking of my speed and just doing the speed. If that makes sense."}
